◉ OrbLayout
Home About Features

Features

Everything you need to build beautiful static sites.

Core Features

0

Layouts

Define page structure once, reuse across all pages

1

Components

Reusable HTML blocks with prop-based data injection

2

Props

Pass data to components via HTML attributes

3

Variables

Use syntax for dynamic content

4

Loops

Iterate over arrays with {{#each}} blocks

5

Conditionals

Show/hide content with {{#if}} and {{#unless}}

6

Named Slots

Multiple content areas in a single layout

7

Imports

Import components with custom tag aliases

8

Scoped Styles

Component-level CSS that stays organized

9

Dev Server

Live reload development server built in

More coming in v2.0

Partials, nested layouts, markdown support, and more.

© 2026 OrbLayout — Built with ◉ OrbLayout v1.0
